incentive_formula: Fixed per‑unit rebates (see measures); bonus fuel‑substitution rebates require CPUC D.19‑08‑009 criteria
funding_cap: $25,000 per metered VPU account per fiscal year; ≤50% of total project cost (incl. labor)
